title: import package is broken under multiply instantiated cells

features.name: package containing functions with wildcard import
features.description: Code should include a package containing function definitions that are imported into a module using wildcard import

features.name: imported function usage in localparam
features.description: Code should include a module with wildcard package import where imported functions are used in localparam assignments
features.snippet:
import driver_definitions::*;
localparam LFSR_WIDTH = max(4, ceil_log2(LFSR_DATA_RANGE));

features.name: multiple instantiation of module with package import
features.description: Code should include a module that imports a package with wildcard import, instantiated multiple times in the design
